summary: The diff implements most requirements for replacing Internet Identity with OTP-based mobile authentication. Backend OTP logic, user profile migration, and frontend OTP authentication flows are present. However, several requirements are partially implemented or missing critical details, particularly around authentication token/session management, brute force protection, Full Name and Class/Course fields in user profile, and ProfileSetupPage removal.

missing_requirements.requirement: Authentication tokens or session management is implemented for authenticated users
missing_requirements.reason: Backend stores Principal-to-MobileNumber mappings but does not implement explicit authentication tokens or session identifiers. The verifyOtp method only creates role assignments and mappings, not tokens.

missing_requirements.requirement: User profile includes Full Name field (text) and Class/Course field (text)
missing_requirements.reason: UserProfile type in backend only contains mobileNumber field. Full Name and Class/Course fields are not stored in the backend user profile model.

missing_requirements.requirement: OTP expires after a reasonable time (e.g., 5 minutes)
missing_requirements.reason: OTP storage does not include timestamp or expiration logic. The pendingOtps map stores OTP without expiration tracking.

missing_requirements.requirement: Failed verification attempts are tracked to prevent brute force
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of failed verification attempt tracking or brute force prevention mechanism in verifyOtp method.

missing_requirements.requirement: For new users, backend accepts Full Name and Class/Course during signup
missing_requirements.reason: createProfile method only accepts mobileNumber. No parameters for Full Name or Class/Course are present in the backend signature.

missing_requirements.requirement: useActor hook retrieves authentication token from OTP auth context and initializes backend actor with OTP authentication token
missing_requirements.reason: File is truncated, but no evidence that useActor.ts was modified to integrate with OTP authentication tokens (constraint specified not to edit directly, but new implementation should exist).

missing_requirements.requirement: ProfileSetupPage route is removed from App.tsx
missing_requirements.reason: ProfileSetupPage.tsx still exists as a modified file and is not removed. App.tsx does not show ProfileSetupPage route removal evidence in the diff summary.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module created for data migration from Principal-based to MobileNumber-based user profiles
hallucinated_features.reason: Migration logic (backend/migration.mo) was not requested in any requirement. The BuildRequest does not include data migration between authentication systems.

hallucinated_features.description: Pause/Resume functionality added to StudyTimer component
hallucinated_features.reason: StudyTimer now includes pause/resume buttons and isPaused state, which was not requested in any requirement. Original requirements only specified start/stop functionality.
